mnemonics: LiSt All Long, Recursively, With Details
keyPoints: -l provides a long listing format with permissions, owner, size, and modification time
-a shows all files, including hidden ones starting with a dot
-R lists directories recursively, showing their contents
commonMistakes: Forgetting that -a shows hidden files, leading to incomplete directory listings
Confusing -l (long format) with -R (recursive) due to similar letters
Using incorrect option combinations without understanding their interaction
